languages.text: "Я многое сделал{mf||а}, чтобы укрепить владения. Твои упреки беспочвенны".
"I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."
languages.original_text: "Я многое сделал{mf||а}, чтобы укрепить владения. Твои упреки беспочвенны".

traits.locale_text: "I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."
"I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."
"I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."
"I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."

languages.text: «No he escatimado esfuerzos para fortificar estas instalaciones. Sus reproches son infundados».
languages.original_text: "I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."

traits.locale_text: «No he escatimado esfuerzos para fortificar estas instalaciones. Sus reproches son infundados».

languages.text: “为了巩固这些属地，我可没少下功夫。你的指责毫无根据。”
languages.original_text: "I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."

traits.locale_text: “为了巩固这些属地，我可没少下功夫。你的指责毫无根据。”

languages.text: « J'ai tout fait pour renforcer ces terres. Vos reproches sont infondés. »
languages.original_text: "I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai tout fait pour renforcer ces terres. Vos reproches sont infondés. »

languages.text: "Bu mülkleri güçlendirmek için çok şey yaptım. Sitemlerin tamamen yersiz."
languages.original_text: "I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."

traits.locale_text: "Bu mülkleri güçlendirmek için çok şey yaptım. Sitemlerin tamamen yersiz."

languages.text: 「私はこれらの保有を強化するために多くの努力をしました。あなたの非難は根拠がありません。」
languages.original_text: "I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."

traits.locale_text: 「私はこれらの保有を強化するために多くの努力をしました。あなたの非難は根拠がありません。」

languages.text: "Ich habe viel getan, um diese Besitztümer zu stärken. Eure Vorwürfe entbehren jeder Grundlage."
languages.original_text: "I have done much to strengthen these holdings. Your reproaches are without foundation."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe viel getan, um diese Besitztümer zu stärken. Eure Vorwürfe entbehren jeder Grundlage."
